description: You are a Clinical Data Manager for a contract research organization. An overnight database maintenance script malfunctioned and accidentally locked a monitor's account and flagged two active subjects as removed. The sponsor's audit is in 48 hours, so you must restore everything immediately through the OpenClinica interface (login: root / Admin123!). Unlock the account for user 'mrivera' (Dr. Michael Rivera). Restore subjects 'DM-101' and 'DM-103' to active status in the Phase II Diabetes Trial (DM-TRIAL-2024). Re-assign 'mrivera' the 'monitor' role for the Cardiovascular Outcomes Registry (CV-REG-2023).
